summary: Frontend-only end-to-end test of the 7-step Proposal Wizard (Voyanta) in Demo Mode + real Supabase. Wizard mounts via portal under #wizard-mount; progress bar renders all 7 labels in correct order; Previous correctly disabled on step 1; Save Draft + Continue-to-<next> visible on every step. Country code <select> defaults to IN and lists India, USA, UK, UAE, Singapore, Australia, Canada, Germany, France, Switzerland in exact required order. Filling step 1 and clicking 'Continue to Hotels' creates a proposal in Supabase, sets it active, and advances to step 2 with URL ?id=<uuid>&step=2. Steps 2/3/4 render the DynamicTable inventory, multi-select + 'Add N to proposal' works, 'hotel-selected' panel appears with a trash icon per item. Step 5 Costing auto-loads selected items, '+ Add line' adds margin/transfer/visa/etc rows, costing-total updates live. Step 6 Branding fields persist (verified by going back via Previous → values intact, also persisted via saveDraft on Continue). Step 7 Preview renders agency header (TEST_Voyanta_Agency + website), items grouped by kind with counts + 3-item peek, total subtotal, Export JSON button functional, Generate PDF / Generate PPT visible but disabled with 'coming soon'. Progress-bar jump to step 5 works once proposal id is saved. Previous→Step 1 keeps customer-name/phone/destination intact. Legacy /proposals/new and /proposals/brief both 302/SPA-redirect to /proposals/wizard. Dashboard 'Create New Proposal' navigates to /proposals/wizard. ProposalsListPage edit-icon opens wizard?step=1 with id, view-icon opens wizard?step=7. ONE BUG: currency label shows 'Available' instead of 'USD' in costing-total and preview-total — the hotel inventory rows expose a `currency` field whose value is 'Available' (likely a column-mapping issue in resourceService.hotelsService or a mis-named column in the Supabase hotels table). Frontend uses `r.currency || 'USD'` so the wrong value wins.

ui_bugs.issue: Currency renders as 'Available' instead of 'USD' (costing-total reads '1470.00 Available', preview-total reads '1470.00 Available'). Root cause: hotelsService rows expose `currency: 'Available'` (almost certainly a column-mapping bug — the Supabase hotels table likely has a `status='Available'` column being mapped to `currency`, or the actual `currency` column is empty and another field is being aliased). The wizard does `currency: r.currency || 'USD'` when adding items, so 'Available' propagates into proposal_items.currency, then into the totals.

issues: Tailwind CDN production warning in console — pre-existing, informational only.

action_items: Fix the hotel inventory currency mapping in /app/frontend/src/services/resourceService.js (hotelsService.list) or the Supabase hotels table — currently `currency` is being populated with 'Available'. Also harden ProposalWizard.addItemsToProposal to validate r.currency is a real ISO code before persisting (fallback to 'USD' if not in a whitelist).
Optional: normalize costing-total currency to the proposal's own `proposal.currency` (already set to 'USD' in buildPayload) instead of `items[0]?.currency`, which is brittle when items disagree.
critical_code_review_comments: ProposalWizard.jsx is 600 lines and contains 4 inline step components + ProgressBar + Field; recommend splitting Step1/ResourceStep/Step5Costing/Step6Branding/Step7Preview into /pages/wizard/Step*.jsx for readability (>500-line file threshold).
Step5Costing displays `{items[0]?.currency || 'USD'}` for the grand total — fragile when items have mixed currencies; should derive from proposal.currency or assert single currency.
addItemsToProposal forwards `r.currency` blindly; should be sanitized against an ISO-4217 whitelist (this is the reason the 'Available' value leaked).

ProposalsListPage row-click invokes onView (step 7); edit-icon onClick must call stopPropagation so a row-click on the icon area doesn't also bubble to the row → confirmed working in this test but worth a unit guard.
Wizard mutates dashboard chrome via direct DOM in a useEffect with no dependency array, runs every render — costly but functionally correct; consider memoizing or moving into one-time mount effect.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (13/14 requirement bullets pass; currency display bug is the only failure)

test_credentials: Demo Mode via localStorage voyanta_demo_session='1' (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Real Supabase used for proposal + proposal_items writes (RLS disabled per schema_v2). No DB-level RLS errors encountered.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 real Supabase proposal during testing: id=453a1161-54f3-465a-b6f6-523b15a5906d, name='Bali — TEST_Wizard_Cust'. Recommend deleting via /proposals → Delete after main agent verifies fix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wizard end-to-end smoke is solid. Re-test focus after main agent fix: (1) re-run the wizard create flow, add 2 hotels, advance to step 5, verify costing-total ends in 'USD' (not 'Available'); (2) verify preview-total currency; (3) export the JSON and inspect items_by_kind[hotel][0].currency == 'USD'. Selectors used: [data-testid=proposal-wizard], step-1..7, country-code, customer-name/phone/email/destination/adults/children/budget, wizard-prev/save/next, step-hotel/flight/activity, add-hotels-to-proposal, hotel-selected, step-costing, add-line-select, costing-total, step-branding, brand-name/website/etc, step-preview, proposal-preview, preview-total, export-json, generate-pdf, generate-ppt. Proposal id 453a1161-54f3-465a-b6f6-523b15a5906d already exists for fast reload tests.
rca of the issue: BUG: 'Available' currency string in costing/preview totals. RCA: hotelsService.list() returns hotel rows whose `currency` property is literally the string 'Available' (most likely the Supabase `hotels` table has a status/availability column being aliased to `currency`, or the actual currency column is missing and resourceService is picking the wrong key during row mapping). Reproduction: enter demo, /proposals/wizard, fill step 1, Continue to Hotels, select any 2 hotels, Add to proposal, Continue through to Costing → costing-total shows '<n>.<dd> Available'. Mitigation: (a) immediate — in ProposalWizard.addItemsToProposal change `currency: r.currency || 'USD'` to `currency: /^[A-Z]{3}$/.test(r.currency) ? r.currency : 'USD'`; (b) proper — fix the resourceService mapping or backfill the hotels.currency column in Supabase.
